title: What is HR College Merit List 2026-27?

detail.title: What is HR College Merit List 2026-27?
detail.short_info: HR College Merit List 2026-27 has been released. Check First Merit List for BAMMC, BCOM, BAF, BFM, BMS, BBI, BCOM-WM, BCOM-THM & BCOM-RM at H.R. College of Commerce & Economics. Download PDF now from official HSNC University portal.

content.text: HR College Merit List 2026-27 has been officially released for UG programs for the academic year 2026-27. Students can now check the First Merit List for popular courses like BAMMC, BCOM, BAF, BFM, BMS, BBI and many more at H.R. College of Commerce & Economics under HSNC University.

sections.heading: HR College Merit List 2026-27 Overview Table

rows: BAMMC, BCOM, BAF, BFM, BMS, BBI, BCOM-WM, BCOM-THM, BCOM-RM

content.text: Official Link: Check HR College Merit List 2026-27

sections.heading: What is HR College Merit List 2026-27?

content.text: H.R. College of Commerce & Economics (Hassaram Rijhumal College), a top constituent college of HSNC University, Mumbai, has published the First Merit List for admissions to various undergraduate and postgraduate programs for the session 2026-27. The merit list is prepared primarily on the basis of Class 12 marks (with possible weightage for entrance tests in programs like BMS). This list is crucial for students seeking admission in commerce, management, finance, mass media and specialized B.Com programs.

sections.heading: HR College UG First Merit List 2026-27

content.text: H.R. College has released the UG First Merit List 2026-27 for all major self-financed and aided programs. This list includes highly competitive courses that attract thousands of applications every year from across Maharashtra and India. Students whose names appear in the list must complete the admission formalities within the given deadline to secure their seat. The college is known for excellent faculty, strong industry connections and outstanding placement records.

sections.heading: How to Check HR College Merit List 2026-27?

items: Go to H. R. College Merit List section.
Click on the desired program PDF.
Search your name using Ctrl + F.
